2025-02-19T08:33:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to a signalling equipment fault near Admiralty Station, the total journey time on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central Station and Tsuen Wan Station could be extended by 10-15 minutes. 2025-02-19T08:33:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於金鐘站附近有信號設備故障，荃灣綫來往中環站及荃灣站的行車時間預計需要額外10-15分鐘。需要過海的乘客，可考慮乘搭東涌綫或東鐵綫。現時荃灣綫月台上的乘客較多，候車時間亦會較長。

description.LOCATION_CN: 荃灣綫及荃灣綫服務延誤

2025-02-19T18:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Extra travelling time can be expected on the Tsuen Wan Line.
2025-02-19T18:34:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 荃灣綫列車預計需要額外行車時間， 
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2025-02-19T18:41:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Due to a signalling equipment fault near Admiralty Station, the total journey time on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central Station and Tsuen Wan Station could be extended by 10-15 minutes. Passengers crossing the harbour are advised to use the Tung Chung Line or East Rail Line. Longer waiting times on Tsuen Wan Line platforms can be expected. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2025-02-19T18:41:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 由於金鐘站附近有信號設備故障，荃灣綫來往中環站及荃灣站的行車時間預計需要額外10-15分鐘。 需要過海的乘客，可考慮乘搭東涌綫或東鐵綫。現時荃灣綫月台上的乘客較多，候車時間亦會較長。 
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2025-02-19T18:48:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that The signalling equipment fault near Admiralty Station on the Tsuen Wan Line has been fixed. Normal train service is gradually resuming.
2025-02-19T18:48:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 金鐘站附近的信號設備已完成復修。荃灣綫列車服務逐步回復正常。

2025-02-19T20:10:00.CONTENT_EN:
Traffic at the following road sections have resumed normal:
– Salisbury Road near Nathan Road (Hung Hom bound)
– Nathan Road (Salisbury Road bound)
– Kowloon Park Drive (Salisbury Road bound)
– Canton Road (Salisbury Road bound).
2025-02-19T20:10:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通現已恢復正常:
–梳士巴利道近彌敦道(往紅磡方向)
–彌敦道(往梳士巴利道方向)
–九龍公園徑(往梳士巴利道方向)
–廣東道(往梳士巴利道方向)。

2025-02-19T22:37:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Island Eastern Corridor (Chai Wan bound) near North Point Ferry Pier is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2025-02-19T22:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，東區走廊(往柴灣方向)近北角碼頭的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。
